query:
UPDATE projects SET 
  videoUrl = 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CUYFXeA-Rj4',
  builderDescription = 'Pride Purple Group is one of Pune''s most trusted real estate developers, established in 1995. With over 25 years of excellence, they have delivered 50+ residential and commercial projects across Pune. Known for innovative designs, quality construction, and timely delivery, Pride Purple has earned the trust of over 15,000 happy homeowners. Their projects are characterized by premium amenities, strategic locations, and sustainable building practices.',
  builderLogo = '/images/partners/pride-purple.png',
  builderEstablished = 1995,
  builderProjects = 50
WHERE id = 1;
